_comment: Konjo lifecycle hooks (Phase 11), opt-in. Merge the `hooks` block into the consuming repo's .claude/settings.json. Two narrow hooks, both tied to verification, is the ceiling; do not add more. Copy stop-verify.sh and posttooluse-format.sh into .konjo/hooks/ (or adjust the paths below). The Stop hook runs verify_cmd and blocks a red end-of-turn; the PostToolUse hook runs format_cmd after an edit and never blocks.
